title: Enable admin mode with valid local key
description: Verifies a user can authenticate using a valid local admin key and sees an admin mode indicator in the sidebar.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the admin login control in the sidebar
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the access key field
Submit the authentication
Verify an admin mode indicator is visible in the sidebar

title: Admin status remains consistent across core routes
description: Verifies admin mode UI remains enabled and consistent when navigating across dashboard routes within the same session.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the admin login control in the sidebar
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the access key field
Submit the authentication
Click the navigation link to open the GR Hub
Click the navigation link to open the Automation Center
Click the navigation link to open the AX Planning page
Verify an admin mode indicator is visible in the sidebar

title: Create crawling target as admin and see it after page reload
description: Verifies an admin can register a crawling target and it remains visible after reloading the page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the admin login control in the sidebar
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the access key field
Submit the authentication
Click the navigation link to open the Automation Center
Start new target registration
Fill Admin Target A into the target name field
Fill a valid URL into the target URL field
Fill semiconductor, fab, equipment into the seed keywords field
Select a valid target category
Submit registration
Press F5 to reload the page
Verify the registered crawling target is displayed in the targets list

title: Create a new AX project plan and see it listed
description: Verifies a user can create a new AX project plan with a title and details, save it, and see the newly created plan appear in the planning list.

steps.description: Navigate to /ax-planning
Click the control to start a new plan
Fill a unique plan title into the plan title field
Fill basic plan details into the plan details field
Submit the plan save action
Verify a success confirmation is visible
Verify the new plan appears in the plans list

title: Open GR Hub detail panel to view source link and AI summary
description: Verifies selecting a GR Hub item opens a sliding detail panel that includes the original source link and an AI summary.

steps.description: Navigate to /gr-hub
Select an item from the grants or policies list
Verify the detail panel is displayed with an original source link and an AI summary

title: Create crawling target as guest and see simulation notice
description: Verifies a guest can register a crawling target and sees a simulation notice indicating the target is session-only.

steps.description: Navigate to /automation
Start new target registration
Fill Guest Target A into the target name field
Fill a valid URL into the target URL field
Fill grants, policy into the seed keywords field
Select a valid target category
Submit registration
Verify a simulation notice is visible indicating the target is not persisted

title: Open an existing AX plan and return to the planning dashboard
description: Verifies a user can open a plan from the AX planning list, view its details, and return to the planning dashboard successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /ax-planning
Click the control to start a new plan
Fill a unique plan title into the plan title field
Fill basic plan details into the plan details field
Submit the plan save action
Click the newly created plan in the plans list to open it
Verify the plan detail view is displayed
Click the control to return to the planning dashboard
Verify the planning dashboard with the plans list is displayed

title: Guest target is not persisted after reload
description: Verifies a crawling target registered in guest mode does not persist after reloading the Automation Center.

steps.description: Navigate to /automation
Start new target registration
Fill Guest Target Ephemeral into the target name field
Fill a valid URL into the target URL field
Fill temporary, session into the seed keywords field
Select a valid target category
Submit registration
Press F5 to reload the page
Verify the previously registered guest target is not displayed in the targets list

title: Close GR Hub detail panel and return to list
description: Verifies the user can close the GR Hub detail panel and return to the list view for continued browsing.

steps.description: Navigate to /gr-hub
Select an item from the grants or policies list
Close the detail panel
Verify the user is returned to the GR Hub list view with items available to select

title: Sequentially inspect multiple GR Hub items without stale panel content
description: Verifies opening and closing detail panels for multiple items in sequence works and the panel updates to the newly selected item.

steps.description: Navigate to /gr-hub
Select an item from the grants or policies list
Close the detail panel
Select a different item from the list
Verify the detail panel is displayed for the newly selected item with an original source link and an AI summary

title: Prevent saving a plan when required fields are empty
description: Verifies the plan cannot be saved when required inputs are missing and the UI shows an in-form validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /ax-planning
Click the control to start a new plan
Clear the plan title field if it has a value
Submit the plan save action
Verify a validation error is visible
Verify the user remains in the plan creation view

title: Validate missing URL on crawling target registration
description: Verifies the registration form blocks submission when the target URL is empty and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /automation
Start new target registration
Fill Missing URL Target into the target name field
Fill keywords into the seed keywords field
Select a valid target category
Submit registration
Verify a URL validation error is visible

title: Discard plan creation and return to dashboard without saving
description: Verifies a user can exit the new plan flow without saving and returns to the planning dashboard without adding a new plan.

steps.description: Navigate to /ax-planning
Click the control to start a new plan
Fill a unique plan title into the plan title field
Click the control to cancel or close plan creation
Verify the planning dashboard with the plans list is displayed
Verify the unsaved plan does not appear in the plans list

title: Reject invalid or empty admin key
description: Verifies submitting an incorrect or empty admin key shows a validation message and does not enable admin mode.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the admin login control in the sidebar
Fill invalid-key into the access key field
Submit the authentication
Verify an access key validation error is visible
Verify an admin mode indicator is not visible in the sidebar

title: Handle long plan title and details without breaking save flow
description: Verifies a user can enter long text in plan title/details, save the plan, and the UI remains usable with the plan listed afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to /ax-planning
Click the control to start a new plan
Fill a long unique plan title into the plan title field
Fill long plan details into the plan details field
Submit the plan save action
Verify a success confirmation is visible
Verify the new plan appears in the plans list

title: Prevent duplicate save from rapid repeated submit
description: Verifies rapidly submitting the save action does not create multiple duplicate plan entries and results in a single saved plan in the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /ax-planning
Click the control to start a new plan
Fill a unique plan title into the plan title field
Fill basic plan details into the plan details field
Submit the plan save action
Immediately submit the plan save action again
Verify the new plan appears only once in the plans list
